name: White Chile
recipeInstructions:
1. Place beans in a heavy large pot. Add enough cold water to cover by at least 3 inches and soak overnight.
2. Place chicken in a heavy large saucepan. Add cold water to cover and bring to simmer. Cook until just tender, about 15 minutes. Drain and cool.
3. Remove skin and cut chicken into cubes.
4. Drain beans.
5. Heat oil in the same pot over medium-high heat. Add onions and saute until translucent, about 10 minutes.
6. Stir in garlic, then chiles, cumin, oregano, cloves, and cayenne and saute for 2 minutes.
7. Add beans and stock and bring to boil. Reduce heat and simmer until beans are very tender, stirring occasionally, about 2 hours.
8. Add chicken and one cup cheese to the chili and stir until cheese melts. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
9. Serve with remaining cheese, sour cream, salsa, and cilantro.
